selected_markets.title: Will the **high temp in Austin** be 74-75° on Feb 14, 2026?

valuations.rationale: Mid-probability of 1.5% appears underpriced given historical Austin February temperatures (avg high ~63°F). A 74-75°F high is warm but not extreme for Feb 14. Positive enrich_bias (4.08%) suggests market underestimation. However, low volume (591) and specific date/range constraints limit confidence. Fair estimate incorporates bias adjustment while acknowledging uncertainty in precise temperature prediction.
